scripts.build: pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/shared build && pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/server build && pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/shared build && pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/shared test && pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/server test && pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/web test && pnpm test:scripts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/web typecheck
scripts.test:e2e:core: pnpm --filter @fog-maze-race/shared build && playwright test tests/e2e/admin-maps.spec.ts tests/e2e/nickname-edit.spec.ts tests/e2e/results-overlay-elapsed-time.spec.ts tests/e2e/us1-race-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/us2-reconnect.spec.ts tests/e2e/us3-room-admin.spec.ts
